About Harezm

Harezm was founded in 2010 with the goal of deep specialization in SAP ERP Financial applications. We started our journey with the principle of "doing what we know best, in the best possible way."

We are not just a software supplier; we are a strategic consulting partner that analyzes our clients' business processes, identifies bottlenecks, and builds the most efficient solution path with a "best practice" approach.

As a global service provider, we make a difference with our deep expertise gained across multiple sectors, our high-quality service approach, and our vision that seamlessly bridges SAP and Finance.

Mission

To secure the success of our clients in financial SAP projects, reduce operational risks, and design sustainable, scalable systems.

Vision

To be the most trusted and authoritative partner in strategic SAP Finance consulting across the region.

Your solution partner, specialized in SAP financial modules, offering consulting at global standards.
